Invoice Maker

Create professional GST invoices with automatic tax calculation. Add your business details, client info, line items and download a clean PDF invoice. Data saved locally in your browser.

Free Invoice Maker for Indian Freelancers and Businesses

This invoice maker is designed for freelancers, consultants, small business owners, and traders in India. You can create a professional-looking GST invoice, calculate taxes automatically, and download it as a PDF — all for free with no account required.

How to Create an Invoice

  1. Enter your business name, address, phone, email and optional GSTIN
  2. Fill in client name and address
  3. Set invoice number, date and due date
  4. Add line items with description, quantity, rate, GST% and discount
  5. Optionally add bank details, notes and terms
  6. Click "Download Invoice PDF" to save a professional PDF
  7. Click "Save Draft" to preserve your data in this browser

Who Should Use This Tool

  • Freelancers: Web designers, developers, writers, photographers
  • Consultants: CA, lawyers, management consultants
  • Traders: Small shops, retail traders, distributors
  • Service providers: Electricians, plumbers, tutors, coaches
  • Agencies: Digital marketing, HR, recruitment firms

GST Invoice Fields Explained

  • GSTIN: Your 15-digit GST Identification Number (if registered)
  • HSN/SAC: You can add this in the item description field
  • CGST + SGST vs IGST: This tool calculates a combined GST. For inter-state supply, it applies as IGST; for intra-state, split equally as CGST + SGST
  • Reverse Charge: Add this as a note in the terms section if applicable

Important Note

This tool creates a standard invoice format for convenience. For legal GST compliance, verify your invoice format with a Chartered Accountant. GST rules vary based on your registration type (Regular, Composition, Unregistered). Do not use this as a substitute for professional accounting software if you are a regular GST-registered business.
